system: Aletheia Synaptic Model Mesh (qwen3.5:35b-a3b + phi4:14b SH routing + Claude Sonnet CS routing)

configuration.retrieval: 9-channel RRF (vector, BM25, temporal, entity, entity-scoped, sub-query, graph, Hebbian, HyDE)
configuration.hardware: 3x consumer GPU (RTX 5090 + 2x RTX 3090) + M5 Pro MacBook
configuration.inference: All-local (except CS routing to Claude Sonnet and GPT-4o judging)

key_findings: Undirected Hebbian pathway strengthening reduces accuracy by 2.5pp (77.6% → 80.1% without)
Category-specific model routing (+0.9pp) outperforms uniform pipeline changes
Per-category treatment is mandatory — global changes regress at least one category
76% of single-hop failures are retrieval misses from indirect semantic phrasing
90% of multi-hop failures are reasoning errors, not retrieval failures
